subject: Re: Attachment FEquipMatrix
body:
fine let's orderit  


----- Original Message ----
From: John Amerling <john_amerling@earthlink.net>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, May 21, 2007 7:53:54 AM
Subject: Attachment FEquipMatrix


I am sending this e mail as requested yesterday. This document is in the package I sent you on Friday. It lists the aggregate prices to the island for each piece of equipment for each of the batching options given in the report. Our recommdation is the "Batch Plant" listed below.These numbers were not called out in the summary given to you and should have been because they are contained in the report. The information which you wish to have is in the body of our report. In the future total to the island costs will be specifically called out on the face of any summary which you are given. 


Attachment F
 
Equipment Matrix

fine let's orderit 

----- Original Message ----
From: John Amerling <john_amerling@earthlink.net>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, May 21, 2007 7:53:54 AM
Subject: Attachment FEquipMatrix

I am sending this e mail as requested yesterday. This document is in the package I sent you on Friday. It lists the aggregate prices to the island for each piece of equipment for each of the batching options given in the report. Our recommdation is the "Batch Plant" listed below.These numbers were not called out in the summary given to you and should have been because they are contained in the report. The information which you wish to have is in the body of our report. In the future total to the island costs will be specifically called out on the face of any summary which you are given.
